message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in var_tracking.zig for closures

Long-term fix: Made collectReferencedVarsInNode and collectUsedNamesFromNode
comprehensive to match isParamUsedInNode for proper closure variable capture.

Added handling for:
- fstring, listcomp, dictcomp, genexp, lambda
- try_stmt, with_stmt, raise_stmt
- starred/double_starred args, keyword_args in calls
- subscript slice ranges, if_expr, boolop
- All compound statements (if, for, while, etc.)

This ensures nested functions correctly capture all outer scope variables
used in f-strings, comprehensions, and other complex expressions.
